title: Bible in Runyoro-Rutooro 1964 Version
description_vernacular: Pao Kurireu meardu kurire boei rugadu. Dukodire ure tonaregedu mitodu rawuje baru piji mato boe etae. Meartorure jiwuge eiamedu boe ewimodukare pugeje. Meartorure jiwuge emugumode Pao Kurireu apo rugadu. Du akedumodukare rugadu.

language.name: Nyoro
language.area: West, Hoima, Masindi, Bundibugyo, Kamwenge, and Kibale districts, south and southeast of Lake Albert.
